steps.t: A barrel of Lyndelby Northern Leaf can be found in Lyndelby. You should try the Lyndelby Northern Leaf.
A barrel of Hubo's Berry-bear can be found in Lyndelby. You should try Hubo's Berry-bear.
A barrel of Old Eagle Wings can be found in Lyndelby. You should try Old Eagle Wings.
Heldric Túcca can be found in Lyndelby. You should talk to Heldric Túcca.
